response.overview: A world, where people have to work together, in order to achieve similar goals, not necessarily on a physical form.  Aira, Clarke and Tommy are three teenagers, who try to communicate, and at the same time — survive, while trying not to get mentally impacted by one another’s ignorance and emotional un-intelligence.
response.tagline: “But aren’t we all a bit harsh at the moment? I mean, the world is kind of… ending.” — Together
response.title: Together
